metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4614
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 5. Electron micrographs from adult rat cerebral cortex (Cx, A-C) and hippocampal CA3 region (Hc, D-F) stained for OBCAM.
(A-C) Dendritic spines exhibited intense OBCAM immunoreactivity only at postsynaptic sites in the cerebral cortex (A, B). The immunoreactivity was also positive at postsynaptic site on somatic synapses of pyramidal neurons (C).
Moderate labeling was also seen within the cytoplasm of dendrites and somata. (D-F) OBCAM immunoreactivity was observed at the postsynaptic sites of dendritic synapses in hippocampal CA3 region (D, E). The immunoreactivity was also positive at the postsynaptic site of somatic synapses (F). Experimental description: "Male Wistar rats were used for these experiments. Rats were housed under standard conditions, in a 12-h light:dark cycle with free access to food and water."

monoclonal antibody against OBCAM (clone 8-4A3, dilution 1:500)
